# Supported Versions

We are continuously releasing new versions of the Intercom React Native plugin with bug fixes and new features. We encourage all customers to keep up to date with the latest version. A list of all our release can be found on our [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/intercom/intercom-react-native/releases) page.

The Intercom React Native wrapper supports version **0.59** of React Native and above. If you are using an older version of React Native, please upgrade.

- The Intercom iOS SDK supports **iOS 15** and above.
- The Intercom Android SDK supports **API 21** and above.
